selected_goal: Add a real-PDF regression for the top suspicious crop candidate, 13winter11_q10.
why_this_now: The review pack identified 13winter11_q10 as the highest-severity suspicious crop. Visual inspection showed the current canonical PNG includes questions 6-9 before question 10, while a targeted regeneration with current code excludes q9.
repo_evidence: output/pm1/pm1_2011_w11_13_ms_q10_markscheme.png visually includes questions 6, 7, 8, and 9 before q10.
A run-local process_sample probe generated q10 text without q9 and a 1606x4616 crop under iteration-02/probe-output.
tests/test_sample_pipeline.py already contains real-PDF mark-scheme regression tests for historical crop boundaries.
acceptance_criteria: The q10 mark-scheme text contains q10 content and excludes q9 content.
The regenerated q10 mark-scheme image is substantially smaller than the stale contaminated canonical output.
test_expectations: Add one focused test in tests/test_sample_pipeline.py.
implementation_boundaries: Do not change parser code unless the regression fails.
Do not intentionally rewrite canonical output in this iteration.
repo_hygiene_risk: Low for source changes. A prior probe accidentally wrote one generated q10 image under output; this is documented and should be reviewed separately.
rollback_plan: Remove the added regression test if it proves inappropriate.
done_when: The focused real-PDF regression passes and the implementation report records whether parser code was needed.
